Description: _-delimited list of years to model OR bash-formatted year ranges (start..end..step). For example, 2010_2015_2020..2035..3_2040..2050..5 means: 2010, 2015, then 2020 through 2035 in 3-year steps, then 2040 through 2050 in 5-year steps. startyear will be prepended if it is not included. Truncated at endyear.
Select natural gas supply curve (0 = cendiv, 1 = national + cendiv, 2 = static, 3 = national)
Indicate whether to run PRAS for 2007-2013 between each pair of solve years (0=never; 1=just the final solve year; 2=always)
